metadata.description: A comprehensive collection of Claude Code plugins for system administration, development, and productivity workflows

plugins.name: ai-tools
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for AI tool management, MCP server configuration, and AI workflow automation slash commands and agents.

plugins.name: context-toolkit
plugins.description: A comprehensive toolkit implementing the CONTEXT.md workflow system for managing human-authored context and agent-ready briefings, bridging natural expression and AI-optimized formats.

plugins.name: git-github
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for Git version control, GitHub repository management, and collaborative development workflows.

plugins.name: claude-janitor
plugins.description: Repository cleanup toolkit with automated operations for removing clutter, organizing structure, and polishing documentation.

plugins.name: home-budget-helper
plugins.description: A workspace template for household budget management using Claude Code CLI with predefined agents, slash commands, and directory structures for transaction processing, budget creation, expense analysis, goal tracking, and report generation.

plugins.name: audio-editing
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for audio editing, conversion, processing, and microphone management slash commands and agents.

plugins.name: image-editing
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for image processing, photo editing, batch image operations, and visual media management.

plugins.name: video-editing
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for video editing, transcoding, video processing, and multimedia workflow automation.

plugins.name: diary-planner
plugins.description: A workflow planning and time management template with agent definitions and slash commands for managing daily, weekly, and monthly schedules while maintaining connections between immediate tasks and longer-term objectives.

plugins.name: tech-docs
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for documentation generation, technical writing, README creation, and documentation management workflows.

plugins.name: fix-documentation
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for automated technical documentation generation and code documentation workflows.

plugins.name: ideation
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for brainstorming, idea generation, project planning, and creative problem-solving workflows.

plugins.name: learning
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for learning resources, skill development, educational content creation, and knowledge management.

plugins.name: seo
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for SEO optimization, meta tag management, and search engine optimization workflows.

plugins.name: tech-research
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for technology research, competitive analysis, technical documentation retrieval, and research workflows.

plugins.name: home-assistant-manager
plugins.description: A comprehensive Home Assistant OS management template with 20+ slash commands for health monitoring, backup management, integration support, network diagnostics, maintenance operations, device management, and automation assistance.

plugins.name: filesystem-organisation
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for file system organization, folder structure optimization, and file management automation workflows.

plugins.name: lan-manager
plugins.description: A specialized workspace for network system administration on local area networks, providing tools and scripts for LAN scanning, device discovery, device management, and network operations with context-aware topology information.

plugins.name: linux-desktop-mgmt
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for Linux desktop environment management, KDE/Plasma configuration, and desktop system administration.

plugins.name: linux-server-mgmt
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for Linux server administration, service management, and server infrastructure workflows.

plugins.name: security-checkup
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for security audits, vulnerability scanning, firewall configuration, and system security hardening workflows.

plugins.name: repo-retrofitter
plugins.description: Bulk-retrofit repositories with AI agent scaffolding (CLAUDE.md, slash commands, subagents, MCP recommendations). Supports scan, interactive, and fully autonomous modes.

plugins.name: writing-editing
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for writing assistance, proofreading, style editing, and text transformation workflows.

plugins.name: make-agent-friendly
plugins.description: Prepares human-developed codebases for agentic development with structured refactoring, CLAUDE.md creation, and agent-friendly infrastructure.

plugins.name: qa-team
plugins.description: A multi-agent QA system for comprehensive code review and quality validation with specialized agents for general QA, cleanup, documentation, API review, performance optimization, and deployment review.

plugins.name: israeli-tech-shopping
plugins.description: Comparison shop Israeli tech retailers using BrowserMCP — search KSP, Ivory, Bug, TMS and more with real browser sessions

plugins.name: claude-templatizer
plugins.description: Turn a set of existing Claude Code workspace repos into a reusable GitHub template repo by extracting their commonalities.

plugins.name: session-transfer
plugins.description: Transfer a Claude Code session to a fresh instance — full context transfer via a structured HANDOVER.md (with a dedicated writer subagent), or quick-jump skills for spawning a sibling Konsole/Claude window at the current directory.

plugins.name: new-repo-from-template
plugins.description: Create a new GitHub repo from 80+ template scaffolds. Single skill matches natural-language intent against the manifest and uses gh repo create --template. Manifest-only — no bundled scaffold copies.

plugins.name: bug-catcher
plugins.description: Slash commands for rapid Linux system bug capture and diagnosis — check fresh logs the moment an issue occurs.

plugins.name: docker-manager
plugins.description: Slash commands and subagents for managing Docker containers, Compose stacks, volumes, networks, and multi-environment deployments.

plugins.name: conda-manager
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for managing, auditing, and optimising Conda environments — list, validate, compare, backup, and clean up environments with AI assistance.

plugins.name: mcp-command-generator
plugins.description: Natural language MCP server installation assistant for Claude Code. Generates and optionally executes valid 'claude mcp add' commands from plain English descriptions, backed by a curated server catalog and syntax reference.

plugins.name: spec-starter
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow for Claude Code: transforms free-form project descriptions into structured specifications, context files, and decision records.

plugins.name: claudemd-chunker
plugins.description: Slash command that prunes bloated CLAUDE.md files to their essentials and offloads supplementary context into an agent-context/ folder.

plugins.name: redaction
plugins.description: Human-guided document redaction, identity obfuscation, alias management, and metadata scrubbing for whistleblowing, source protection, anonymous publishing, and research anonymization workflows.

plugins.name: bash-alias-manager
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for managing bash aliases — add, edit, delete, prune, ideate, and back up ~/.bash_aliases using a guided workflow.

plugins.name: proxmox-manager
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for managing Ubuntu VMs hosted on Proxmox. Covers Proxmox host inspection, VM lifecycle, Docker deployments, XFS storage, Cloudflare Tunnels, backups, and system health — with a setup wizard to tailor the environment to any server.

plugins.name: synology-manager
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for managing a Synology NAS via SSH — guided first-run setup, persistent NAS context, and commands for shared folders, volumes, mounts, and storage monitoring.

plugins.name: workspace-setup
plugins.description: Interactive assistant for discovering and cloning Claude Code workspace templates. Asks about your objectives, recommends relevant workspaces from a curated catalog, and clones them to a directory of your choice.

plugins.name: ai-attribution
plugins.description: Adds a transparent human-AI attribution section to a project README, documenting which parts of the work were human-authored and which were AI-assisted or AI-generated.

plugins.name: model-identifier
plugins.description: Injects a model self-identification instruction block into CLAUDE.md so Claude announces its model name and API identifier at the start of every conversation.

plugins.name: new-turn-hook
plugins.description: Evaluates whether the current conversation context is still useful or whether the user should start a fresh conversation to avoid context bloat and degraded performance.

plugins.name: brainstorm-solutions
plugins.description: When you hit a wall, spin up a research workspace to brainstorm solutions — captures the blocker, seeds context, and kicks off deep research.

plugins.name: stack-search
plugins.description: Spawn a new stack search workspace from the Claude-Stack-Research-Workspace template — clone, name, create GitHub repo, run Tavily landscape scan, and kick off the structured 27-question intake interview.

plugins.name: ecosystem-mapper
plugins.description: Discover, categorize, and publish technology ecosystem maps as GitHub repositories with structured READMEs, dynamic badges, and alphabetical organization.

plugins.name: hp5200-printer
plugins.description: HP DeskJet 5200 printer and scanner operations — ink levels, color/B&W printing, scanning, auto-discovery. A simple demo of local AI agent hardware integration.

plugins.name: what-thing
plugins.description: Decision support for choosing the right Claude Code primitive — skill, subagent, slash command, plugin, MCP server, hook, or output style — based on what you're trying to build. Grounded in the official Anthropic docs, personalised by stored user context.

plugins.name: open-router-model-research
plugins.description: Research, filter, compare, and evaluate AI models on OpenRouter — discover models by capability (tool use, vision, audio), get cost/context-aware recommendations, run head-to-head comparisons, and conduct deep research that goes beyond the OpenRouter catalog.

plugins.name: github-research
plugins.description: Research existing GitHub repositories before building — search, rank, and evaluate candidate tools via gh CLI with careful attention to stars, recency, and maintenance quality. Five skills for finding, comparing, and documenting tooling options so you can decide whether to use, fork, or build.

plugins.name: claude-user-memory
plugins.description: Persistent cross-session memory about the user, backed by Mem0. Two isolated contexts (personal and work) with three skills for recall, save, and end-of-session commit.
